title: ChimPak
description: A NeoForge modpack designed for multiplayer, combining exploration, quality-of-life, and creative mods to overall enhance Minecraft.
body:
![Minecraft logo on the top. Below it is "ChimPak" in neon pink. At the bottom "1.20.1" is shown.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f28d50190d0e5ab55781abbe2fcc55a943fdb22.png)

-----

*ChimPak* is a casual, multiplayer-friendly NeoForge modpack designed to enhance Minecraft with a variety of quality-of-life upgrades, combat improvements, creative tools. In general: **this modpack tries to make the game more fun.**

Originally made for my private server (but I thought it was worth sharing), it combines various hand-picked mods to ensure both survival and creative players enjoy the game without tampering with core gameplay *too* much.

We've got: 
- World generation improvements! Over ~50 new biomes!
- Technology! Create, Immersive Engineering, and Mekanism!
- A little sprinkle of roleplaying elements with Etcetera and Simple Voice Chat
- It runs super well on low-mid hardware...
- ...even on laptops! ~~Sometimes~~ Actually!

Whether you're exploring the vast biomes, building massive factories, or nuking your friend's base, there's something here to make it better.

But.. why download this? Honestly, it started as a private server pack. But it actually turned out pretty well: a well-balanced sandbox that makes Minecraft have more creative and explorative functionality.

Seems fun? Download it & give it a try!

-----
This project uses [Cosmetic Armor Reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked), which is licensed under the Minecraft Mod Public License version 1.01.
